userStories.title: Project scaffolding, .gitignore, go.mod, shared types
acceptanceCriteria: .gitignore exists and includes /slapr/ directory
go.mod exists with module github.com/AdeptMind/pr-emojis-in-slack
Directory structure: cmd/pr-emojis-in-slack/, internal/github/, internal/slack/, internal/emoji/, internal/config/
Shared types defined: Review, PullRequest, Message, Reaction in appropriate packages
Config struct with all fields, loads from PEIS_ prefixed env vars
Code compiles with go build ./...

userStories.title: GitHub client - read event, get PR, get reviews
acceptanceCriteria: WebGithubBackend implementation using net/http and GitHub REST API
ReadEvent reads and parses JSON from GITHUB_EVENT_PATH file
GetPR returns PullRequest with state, merged, mergeable_state fields
GetPRReviews returns list of Review with state (lowercased) and username
Unit tests with mock backend covering all methods
Tests pass with go test ./internal/github/...

userStories.title: Slack client - find message, get/add/remove reactions
acceptanceCriteria: WebSlackBackend implementation using net/http and Slack Web API
FindTimestamp searches messages for PR URL pattern matching <URL> format
GetEmojisForUser filters reactions by user ID
AddReaction handles already_reacted error gracefully (log warning, don't fail)
Unit tests with mock backend covering all methods including edge cases
Tests pass with go test ./internal/slack/...

userStories.title: Emoji logic - GetForReviews and Diff
acceptanceCriteria: GetForReviews groups reviews by author, takes last review per author, returns appropriate emoji
Priority order: changes_requested > approved (with count check) > commented > empty
Diff computes emojis to add and remove given new set and existing set
Unit tests covering: single approval, changes requested, commented, multi-reviewer scenarios, approval count threshold
Tests pass with go test ./internal/emoji/...

userStories.title: Main orchestration and entry point
acceptanceCriteria: cmd/pr-emojis-in-slack/main.go wires config, github client, slack client, and runs orchestration
Run function implements same logic as Python main(): read event, check fork, get PR/reviews, find slack message, compute emoji diff, apply changes
Fork PRs are skipped with log message
Missing slack message is handled gracefully with log message
Emojis are added in review-step order (same ordering as Python version)
Integration test using mock backends verifies full flow end-to-end
Binary builds and runs: go build -o pr-emojis-in-slack ./cmd/pr-emojis-in-slack

userStories.title: Dockerfile, action.yml, and CI workflows
acceptanceCriteria: Multi-stage Dockerfile: stage 1 builds static binary with CGO_DISABLED=1, stage 2 copies to scratch or distroless
Final image contains only the binary and CA certificates
action.yml defines the GitHub Action with docker run using the built image
.github/workflows/test.yml runs go test on push/PR
.github/workflows/pr-emojis.yml triggers on pull_request_review and pull_request closed events with correct env vars
docker build completes successfully
